title: Autoprint
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''autoprint''' was the digitized hand-print of a living being. These were typically only taken from celebrities or notable figures, and were usually sold for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to fans.

Many people collected autoprints from their favorite celebrities, carrying a portable scanner to read the being's hand, as a memento or proof that they actually met the person. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] once gave his autoprint—for free—to a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] [[Ganda Kaitoova|fan]] after becoming the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] swoop racing champion. [[Gorse Bendak|Bendak Starkiller]], before his [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], sometimes gave out his autoprint, though not on the occasion that the amnesiac Revan met him.

Years later, after completing the swoop races at the [[Unidentified Iziz cantina|Iziz cantina]], [[Meetra Surik]] asked [[Vix]] whether he wanted her autoprint, but he declined.

{{Tech-stub}}
